name: U.S. GOLD CORP.
summary: U.S. Gold Corp. is a gold, copper, and precious metals development and exploration company operating primarily in Wyoming, Nevada, and Idaho. Its key asset is the CK Gold Project in Wyoming, a development-stage open-pit mine targeting copper concentrate containing gold, copper, and silver from porphyry-style mineralization. The company also holds the Keystone Project in Nevada and the Challis Gold Project in Idaho, both at the exploration stage. It has no current revenue-producing activities.

products.name: CK Gold Project
products.description: Development-stage open-pit mine in Wyoming targeting copper concentrate with gold, copper, and silver from porphyry-style mineralization.

products.name: Keystone Project
products.description: Gold exploration property consisting of 601 unpatented lode mining claims covering approximately 20 square miles in Eureka County, Nevada.

products.name: Challis Gold Project
products.description: Gold exploration property comprising 77 unpatented lode mining claims covering approximately 1,710 acres in Lemhi County, Idaho.

partnerships.description: Access and easement agreement for exploration and potential development activities at the CK Gold Project in Wyoming.
Sold rights to acquire Maggie Creek property in November 2022; retains 0.5% NSR royalty if NGM exercises its option.
ISO 17025 accredited laboratory in Elko, Nevada used for drill core sample preparation and assaying.
